def: Art or process of using the spectrometer, or of measuring wavelengths of rays of a spectrum. -- Spec`tro*met"ric (#), a.
A rare metallic element found in platinum ore. It is a whitemalleable substance. Symbol Da. Atomic weight 154.
A game played with nine pins, or pieces of wood, set on end, atwhich a wooden ball is bowled to knock them down; bowling.
The roebuck in its third year. [Prov. Eng.]
One who, or that which resuscitates. Also used adjectively.
